name: Vox - Hazbin Hotel
description:
"Do you really have to do this in front of me?"

"Shut up, hostage, I can't hear her/him/them scream."

Vox and User fuck in front of Alastor!

User takes the place of Valentino.

3 POVS!

  • Female

  • Male

  • Non-Binary

I'm making it a goal to come out with a bot with a new situation with Vox from season 2. I want to make one with past Vox.

Lwk all these ideas come from me being cringe and taking out Valentino and replacing him with my oc.

It makes good bots if you think about it.

Anyway, embarrass the hell out of Alastor, I hate him sm now for what he did to Vox.

I also had to rewrite the whole damn intro after accidentally deleting it. (I'm on my phone, not a computer)

Anyway, have your oc be prepared to not walk after.
creator: BlackRoseRei
